title: Sora's Digimobs Datapack
description: Digimon Skins For The Digimobs Mod!
body:
Sora Digimobs Skins Is A Datapack That Allows You To Add Skins To You're Digimon.

Black, Blue, Brown, Cyan, Gray, Green, Lightblue, Lightgrey, Lime, Magenta, Orange, Pink, Purple, Red, White, Yellow, Retro And Some Special Error Skins on Select Digimon.

If You Like Hunting For Special Digimon This Data Pack Is For You.

This Data Pack Required The Digimobs Mod To Work!
This Data Pack Will Also Need To Be Added To Your Resource Pack Folder 

Current List Of Digimon As Of V1.7
